hero.title: Intelligence to operate
hero.subtitle: the Real Estate Market with greater precision.
hero.description: Valuation, data and automation to transform market insights into decisions.

overview.title: Brazilian Real Estate: <primary>Current Valuation</primary>
overview.main_paragraph: The Brazilian real estate market is valued at approximately USD 4 trillion in total asset stock, based on the country's Gross Domestic Product (GDP). Annual transaction volume reaches USD 100 billion, reflecting the sector’s scale and relevance.

challenges.title: IBVI’s Expertise and <primary>Sector Challenges</primary>
challenges.main_paragraph: IBVI was created with a clear technical mission: to correct structural distortions in Brazil’s real estate appraisal sector through a robust, data-driven automation system that delivers unprecedented efficiency to the market.

standardization_gaps.title: Standardization Through AI
standardization_gaps.description: Over 70% of appraisers still rely on manual spreadsheets. IBVI replaces these outdated methods with AI-powered automated models, delivering standardized, auditable reports updated in real time.

buyer_hurdles.title: Technical and Structured Pricing
buyer_hurdles.description: While other platforms focus on the commercial journey, IBVI operates at the core of pricing, using registry data, CRIs, FIIs, and hedonic attributes to deliver robust and defensible valuations.

outdated_methods.title: Scalable and Cost-Effective Solution
outdated_methods.description: With declining AI infrastructure costs, IBVI operates at scale with greater agility than regulatory bodies, delivering advanced technology at a market-accessible cost.

transaction_delays.title: Data Traceability and Regulatory Alignment
transaction_delays.description: Asset managers and funds demand transparency and technical rigor. IBVI provides complete data trails, clear statistical methodology, and full compliance with legal requirements and ESG standards.

solution.title: IBVI Platform <primary>Powered by AI</primary>
solution.description: IBVI aims to become the leading authority in real estate valuation in Brazil. By combining cutting-edge Artificial Intelligence, regulatory expertise, and access to data, the platform delivers a system built on transparency, precision, and trust.

data_driven_valuations.title: Unprecedented Time Reduction
data_driven_valuations.description: The IBVI platform reduces transaction times by up to 60%, automating analyses with proprietary AI and delivering accurate, traceable valuations aligned with predefined standards.

predictive_analytics.title: Greater Operational Efficiency
predictive_analytics.description: The system automates critical stages such as validation and pricing, reducing reliance on manual processes and speeding up compliance with CMN Resolution No. 4,951/2021.

intelligent_matching.title: Intelligent Matching
intelligent_matching.description: Connects buyers and properties with 95% compatibility

intelligent_search.title: Standardized Index
intelligent_search.description: Brazil's first luxury real estate index

data_driven_decisions.title: Data-Driven Decisions
data_driven_decisions.description: Recommendations based on over 50 market variables updated in real time

solution.quote: "IBVI's proprietary valuation platform represents a paradigm shift in how Brazilian luxury real estate is evaluated and transacted."

insights.title: Market <primary>Insights</primary>
insights.description: Comprehensive analysis of Brazil's luxury real estate market reveals significant opportunities for technological innovation and standardization.

vision.title: Mission
vision.p1: IBVI’s mission is to lead the development of the next generation of the real estate market in Brazil and, eventually, across Latin America.
vision.p2: With advanced technology, artificial intelligence, and regulatory validation, IBVI introduces a new valuation infrastructure: technical, scalable, and reliable.

expansion.title: Expansion
expansion.p1: With an innovative approach and proprietary technology, IBVI aims to lead the transformation of Brazil’s high-end real estate market.
expansion.p2: The platform is preparing to expand across Latin America, offering digital solutions, reliable data, and automated valuations tailored to the new profile of today’s real estate buyer.

about.title: Discover the IBVI Platform
about.subtitle: Revolutionizing Brazilian Real Estate with AI Intelligence
about.description: The IBVI platform is at the forefront of transforming Brazil's $4 trillion real estate market through cutting-edge Artificial Intelligence and data analysis, bringing unprecedented transparency and precision to property valuations.

transparency.title: Standardization with AI
transparency.description: We replace traditional methods with automated models that deliver technical reports in minutes, with high accuracy and controlled variance.

precision.title: National Technical Benchmark
precision.description: With a proprietary database aligned with Brazilian regulations, IBVI provides valuations compliant with the Central Bank, financial institutions, and asset managers overseeing over USD$220 billions.

innovation.title: Scalable and Secure Solution
innovation.description: Our Google Cloud infrastructure enables scalability to over 1 million valuations per day, reducing costs, ensuring security, and overcoming speed limitations.

technology.title: Our Technology
technology.description: IBVI’s technology combines advanced automation, regulatory intelligence, and proprietary data to deliver accurate, secure, and scalable valuations. Our platform transforms complexity into efficiency.

machine_learning.title: Advanced Machine Learning
machine_learning.description: Our algorithms process vast datasets including property characteristics, market trends, location factors and economic indicators to generate high-precision valuations.

intelligent_search.title: Technical Differentials
intelligent_search.description: IBVI stands out by offering a unique technical infrastructure in Brazil, featuring a proprietary index, structured data architecture, and full integration with the new dynamics of the digital real estate market.
intelligent_search.feature_3: Connection with the New Buyer Profile

expertise.title: Our Expertise
expertise.description: IBVI is composed of experts in Engineering, Data Science, Economics, Communications, and Financial Markets. This technical integration ensures accurate, secure valuations that meet the standards required by institutions and investment funds.

cta.title: Stay Ahead with IBVI Innovations
cta.description: Join the leading Real Estate valuation platform in Brazil.

footer.description: IBVI is transforming the Brazilian real estate market with automated, accurate, and scalable valuations powered by Artificial Intelligence.
footer.address:

São Paulo, SP

intro.title: Introduction
intro.content: This Privacy Policy describes how Instituto Brasileiro de Valores Imobiliários Ltda. EPP, registered under CNPJ No. 47.041.817/0001-71, processes the personal data of users of the IBVI.AI application. By accessing or using IBVI.AI, you acknowledge that you are aware of the practices described in this Policy. For the purposes of the Brazilian General Data Protection Law (LGPD), Instituto Brasileiro de Valores Imobiliários Ltda. EPP acts as the controller of the personal data processed within the Application, unless otherwise indicated.

dataCollected.title: Data We Collect
dataCollected.intro: We may collect different types of personal data, depending on how the Application is used:

registration.title: Registration and authentication data
registration.content: Full name, email address, password (stored securely using hashing and encryption where applicable), profile information, and login data via Google or Apple, such as name, email, and unique account identifier.

location.title: Information provided voluntarily
location.content: Data, texts, queries, prompts, documents, images, valuations, property information, or other information entered by you while using the Application's features.

usage.title: Usage data
usage.content: Access records, usage events, logs, date, time, and duration of access, as well as diagnostic, performance, and Application failure information.

technical.title: Technical data
technical.content: IP address, device type and model, operating system, and technical identifiers of the device, account, or session, used for security, fraud prevention, and improving the experience.

dataUsage.title: How We Use Data
dataUsage.intro: We use personal data for the following purposes:

items.1: Create, authenticate, and manage user accounts, enabling secure access to the Application.
items.2: Operate, maintain, and improve the Application's features.
items.3: Process information you enter and generate responses, analyses, estimates, classifications, summaries, and recommendations, including through artificial intelligence technologies where applicable.
items.4: Provide support and send communications related to your account, security, operation, or relevant changes to the Application.
items.5: Monitor the stability, security, and performance of the platform and prevent fraud, abuse, and unauthorized access.
items.6: Comply with legal and regulatory obligations or determinations of competent authorities and protect the rights and interests of the Application, the company, and users.

dataSharing.title: Data Sharing
dataSharing.intro: We do not sell users' personal data. Data may be shared only when necessary, in the following cases:

items.1: With authentication providers (Google and Apple) and providers of infrastructure, hosting, database, security, technical support, performance analysis, and Application operation.
items.2: With artificial intelligence, language model, and automation providers necessary to deliver the features, which act as processors and handle the data only according to our instructions and applicable law.
items.3: With public authorities, regulatory bodies, or third parties, when required by law, court order, or in the event of corporate reorganization, merger, or acquisition.

security.title: Storage and Security
security.content: We adopt reasonable technical and organizational measures to protect personal data against unauthorized access, loss, alteration, misuse, or improper disclosure, including access control, authentication, encryption where applicable, environment segregation, monitoring, backups, and log records. Despite our efforts, no system is completely secure, and absolute security against all risks cannot be guaranteed.

rights.title: Your Rights (LGPD)
rights.intro: Under the LGPD, you may request at any time:

items.1: Confirmation of the existence of processing and access to your personal data.
items.2: Correction of incomplete, inaccurate, or outdated data.
items.3: Anonymization, blocking, or deletion of unnecessary or excessive data or data processed in non-compliance with the LGPD.
items.4: Data portability and information about the entities with which the data was shared, where applicable.
items.5: Withdrawal of consent, review of automated decisions, and filing a complaint with the Brazilian National Data Protection Authority (ANPD).

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content: Personal data will be retained for as long as necessary to fulfill the purposes described in this Policy, while the account remains active, or for the period necessary to comply with legal, regulatory, and contractual obligations, prevent fraud, ensure platform security, or exercise rights. After account deletion or the end of the processing purpose, data may be deleted, anonymized, or retained only when there is a legal basis for retention.

thirdParty.title: Artificial Intelligence and Third-Party Services
thirdParty.intro: IBVI.AI may use artificial intelligence technologies, language models, and technology providers to process information and generate results related to the Application's features:

items.1: Data entered in the Application is not used to train public third-party models, and we adopt reasonable measures to limit the use of data to the purposes necessary to provide the service.
items.2: Responses and analyses generated by artificial intelligence may contain inaccuracies or limitations and should be critically reviewed before being used for commercial, legal, financial, real estate, or strategic decisions.
items.3: Some providers may be located outside Brazil or store data on international servers; in such cases, we adopt measures consistent with the LGPD to protect data transferred internationally.

minors.title: Children and Adolescents
minors.content: The Application is not intended for minors under 18 years of age, and we do not intentionally collect their personal data. If we identify that minors' data has been collected improperly, we will take reasonable measures to delete such information. If you believe a minor has provided data to the Application, please contact us through the channels indicated in this Policy.

changes.title: Changes to This Policy
changes.content: This Policy may be updated periodically to reflect legal, regulatory, technical, or operational changes. When there are relevant changes, we may notify users through the Application, email, or other appropriate means. The most recent version will always be available in the Application or on a page indicated by the company.

contact.title: Contact and Data Protection Officer
contact.intro: If you have questions, requests, complaints, or wish to exercise rights related to your personal data, please contact us. Controller: Instituto Brasileiro de Valores Imobiliários Ltda. EPP — CNPJ 47.041.817/0001-71 — Av. Magalhães de Castro, 4800, Park Tower, 23rd floor, São Paulo, SP, Brazil.

market_recognition.title: Market Recognition
market_recognition.description: Reference in real estate valuation with AI, recognized by financial institutions and asset managers with over R$1.2 trillion under management.

appShowcase.title: Everything you need, <primary>in the palm of your hand</primary>
appShowcase.subtitle: Meet the IBVI app, now available on the App Store, and see how analyzing the real estate market became simple, fast and intelligent.
appShowcase.busca_desc: Quickly search for information about properties, addresses and more.
appShowcase.mapa_desc: Find information about properties by area, values and regions.
appShowcase.resumo_desc: With advanced AI-powered analysis, IBVI helps investors make better decisions.
